Title: Create verification requests
Content:
To create verification requests, you will need to first identify the entity type of your merchants. The required parameters are available below for each country and entity type (e.g. Philippines Corporation).

You may also need to get a your merchants to sign a Service Agreement with Xendit. Please consult your account manager and we will provide this template as necessary.

Upload files for verification

Next, you will also need to use the Upload File API in order to upload the documents you collected from your merchants to Xendit, and save the IDs to include in the Create Account Holder request.

POST https://api.xendit.co/files
{
  "purpose": "KYC_DOCUMENT",
  "file": "@/Users/MyName/Documents/identity-card.pdf"
}

Create an Account Holder object

Ensure that your Platform account’s API key is granted the permissions below:

  • xenPlatform Accounts write

  • xenPlatform Account Holder write

You will need to fill in the required parameters according to your entity type. Refer to the list of requirements below to build your request body structure. Upon successful creation, we will return account_holder_id .

Include the File IDs returned in the previous step in the kyc_documents parameter.

Sample - PH Corporation

Below is a sample request payload for a Philippines corporation entity type

POST https://api.xendit.co/account_holders 
{
  "business_detail": {
    "type": "CORPORATION",
    "legal_name": "test17",
    "trading_name": "test",
    "description": "testing",
    "industry_category": "ACCOMMODATION",
    "date_of_registration": "2023-02-02",
    "country_of_operation":"PH"
  },
  "individual_details": {
      "role": "owner",
      "type": "PIC",
      "given_names": "test",
      "surname": "test",
      "phone_number": "+63021234567",
      "email": "test@xendit.co",
      "nationality": "PH",
      "place_of_birth": "PH",
      "date_of_birth": "2000-02-02",
      "gender": "MALE"
   },
   "address": {
      "city": "test1",
      "country": "PH",
      "district": "test",
      "postal_code": "1111",
      "street_line1": "test",
      "street_line2": "test",
      "sub_district": "test",
      "province_state": "test"
  },
  "kyc_documents": [
        {
            "type": "SEC_CERTIFICATE_REGISTRATION_DOCUMENT",
            "country": "PH",
            "file_id": "63f8719642f5856dcb142bd2",
        },
        {
            "type": "SELFIE_WITH_PRIMARY_ID_DOCUMENT",
            "country": "PH",
            "file_id": "63f8719642f5856dcb142bd2",
        },
        {
            "type": "ARTICLES_OF_INCORPORATION_DOCUMENT",
            "country": "PH",
            "file_id": "63f8719642f5856dcb142bd2"
        },
        {
            "type": "NOTARIZED_SECRETARY_CERTIFICATE_DOCUMENT",
            "country": "PH",
            "file_id": "63f8719642f5856dcb142bd2"
        },
        {
            "type": "LATEST_GIS_DOCUMENT",
            "country": "PH",
            "file_id": "63f8719642f5856dcb142bd2"
        },
        {
            "type": "SERVICE_AGREEMENT_DOCUMENT",
            "country": "PH",
            "file_id": "63f8719642f5856dcb142bd2"
        }
  ],
  "website_url": "https://xendit.co",
  "phone_number": "+63281234567",
  "email": "test@xendit.co",
}

Link the Account Holder to a sub-account

Once you’ve created your Account Holder, you will need to link the Account Holder to your Partner’s Account using the Platform account’s API key with a write permission for Accounts.

Using the update account endpoint, you will need to link the account_holder_id to a valid business_id that represents your merchant’s sub-account. You can do this by specifying the account_holder_id on the request body.

PATCH https://api.xendit.co/v2/accounts/{sub-account-id}
{
    "account_holder_id": "3bd4dcdd-e6c0-4057-89bf-58d1564b517b"
}

Note that this linking process will also start the verification process of this Account Holder. This will change the Know Your Customer (KYC) verification status from not_started to verification_in_progress.

Requirements by Country and Entity Type

Required Parameters for the Philippines

Parameter

Type

Description

business_detail

object

An object containing the details of your partner’s business

  • type: CORPORATION, INDIVIDUAL, SOLE_PROPRIETORSHIP, PARTNERSHIP, FOREIGN_SEC, FOREIGN_NONSEC

  • legal_name

  • trading_name

  • description

  • industry_category

  • date_of_registration

  • country_of_operation: ISO 3166-2 format

individual_details

array (object)

An array of objects containing the details of your partner’s business personnel

  • role: The role of the individual in your business

  • type: PIC or INCORPORATOR (requires one PIC)

  • given_names

  • surname

  • phone_number

  • email

  • nationality: ISO 3166-2 format

  • place_of_birth

  • date_of_birth

  • gender: male, female, other

  • tax_identification_number

  • address: An object similar to the address object below for the individual. This is only required when they need to activate Cards with USD or recurring capabilities.

address

object

Your business' address containing:

  • city

  • country: ISO 3166-2 format

  • district

  • postal_code

  • street_line1

  • street_line2 (optional)

  • sub_district

  • province_state

kyc_documents

array (object)

An array of objects containing required KYC documents uploaded via File Upload.

  • type: One of the KYC Document Types required below, matching the country and entity type

  • country: The country code matching the business' country

  • file_id: The file ID returned from the File Upload API

  • expires_at (optional): The expiry date of the document if relevant. Format YYYY-MM-DD

website_url

string

The website associated with the business

phone_number

string

The phone number associated with the business

email

string

The email address associated with the business

Refer to the section below for the Industry Category codes we support.

Document requirements by country and entity type

Country

Entity Type

Verification documents

Philippines

All entities require the following.

  • SELFIE_WITH_PRIMARY_ID_DOCUMENT or SELFIE_WITH_SECONDARY_ID_2_DOCUMENT

  • SERVICE_AGREEMENT_DOCUMENT

  • One Primary ID: AUTHORIZED_PERSON_PASSPORT_DOCUMENT, DRIVER_LICENCE_DOCUMENT, PHILSYS_DOCUMENT, ACR_OR_IMMIGRANT_COR_DOCUMENT, UMID_DOCUMENT, SSS_OR_GSIS_DOCUMENT, PRC_LICENSE_DOCUMENT, POSTAL_ID_DOCUMENT, VOTER_ID_DOCUMENT

  • Two secondary IDs: AFP_ID_DOCUMENT, PNP_ID_DOCUMENT, BRF_ID_DOCUMENT, PWD_ID_DOCUMENT, DSWD_CERTIFICATION_DOCUMENT, GSIS_ECARD_DOCUMENT, OFW_ID_DOCUMENT, POLICE_CLEARANCE_DOCUMENT, SEAMAN_BOOK_DOCUMENT

INDIVIDUAL

No additional requirements

SOLE_PROPRIETORSHIP

  • DTI_REGISTRATION_DOCUMENT

  • BIR_2303_DOCUMENT

PARTNERSHIP

  • SEC_CERTIFICATE_REGISTRATION_DOCUMENT

  • ARTICLES_OF_PARTNERSHIP_DOCUMENT

  • NOTARIZED_PARTNER_CERTIFICATE_DOCUMENT

  • BIR_2303_DOCUMENT

CORPORATION

  • SEC_CERTIFICATE_REGISTRATION_DOCUMENT

  • ARTICLES_OF_INCORPORATION_DOCUMENT

  • NOTARIZED_SECRETARY_CERTIFICATE_DOCUMENT

  • LATEST_GIS_DOCUMENT

  • BIR_2303_DOCUMENT

FOREIGN_NONSEC

  • AUTHORIZED_PERSON_PASSPORT_DOCUMENT as the Primary ID, no selfie required

  • PROOF_OF_COMPANY_REGISTRATION_DOCUMENT

  • COUNTRY_ISSUED_BUSINESS_LICENSE_DOCUMENT

  • ARTICLES_OF_INCORPORATION_DOCUMENT

  • BANK_BOOK_SCAN_DOCUMENT

Thailand

PARTNERSHIP, LIMITED_COMPANY, NON_PROFIT, FOREIGN_ENTITY

  • ID_CARD_DOCUMENT

    • or HOUSE_REGISTRATION_DOCUMENT

    • or PASSPORT_OR_WORK_PERMIT_DOCUMENT if foreign

  • COMPANY_CERTIFICATE_DOCUMENT

  • BANK_ACCOUNT_DETAILS_DOCUMENT

  • SHARE_HOLDER_INFORMATION_DOCUMENT

  • (optional) BUSINESS_LICENSE_DOCUMENT

  • (optional) VAT_REGISTRATION_CERTIFICATE_DOCUMENT

  • (optional) COMMMERCIAL_REGISTRATION_CERTIFICATE_DOCUMENT

  • (optional) SERVICE_AGREEMENT_DOCUMENT

Title: Buat request verifikasi
Content:
﻿Untuk membuat request verifikasi, Anda perlu mengidentifikasi jenis entitas pedagang Anda. Parameter yang diperlukan tersedia di bawah ini untuk setiap negara dan jenis entitas (contoh: Philippines Corporation).

Anda mungkin juga perlu meminta merchant Anda untuk menandatangani Perjanjian Layanan dengan Xendit. Silakan berkonsultasi dengan Account Manager Anda dan kami akan menyediakan template ini sesuai kebutuhan.

Unggah file untuk verifikasi

Selanjutnya, Anda juga perlu menggunakan Upload File API untuk mengunggah dokumen yang Anda kumpulkan dari merchant Anda ke Xendit, dan menyimpan ID untuk disertakan dalam request Create Account Holder.

POST https://api.xendit.co/files
{
  "purpose": "KYC_DOCUMENT",
  "file": "@/Users/MyName/Documents/identity-card.pdf"
}

Membuat objek Account Holder

Pastikan kunci API akun Platform Anda diberikan izin di bawah ini:

  • Akun xenPlatform write

  • Account Holder xenPlatform write

Anda harus mengisi parameter yang diperlukan sesuai dengan jenis entitas Anda. Lihat daftar persyaratan untuk membangun struktur request body Anda. Setelah berhasil, kami akan return account_holder_id.

Sertakan File ID yang ditampilkan pada langkah sebelumnya dalam parameter kyc_documents.

Contoh - PH Corporation

Di bawah ini adalah contoh payload permintaan untuk jenis entitas Filipina corporation

POST https://api.xendit.co/account_holders 
{
  "business_detail": {
    "type": "CORPORATION",
    "legal_name": "test17",
    "trading_name": "test",
    "description": "testing",
    "industry_category": "ACCOMMODATION",
    "date_of_registration": "2023-02-02",
    "country_of_operation":"PH"
  },
  "individual_details": {
      "role": "owner",
      "type": "PIC",
      "given_names": "test",
      "surname": "test",
      "phone_number": "+63021234567",
      "email": "test@xendit.co",
      "nationality": "PH",
      "place_of_birth": "PH",
      "date_of_birth": "2000-02-02",
      "gender": "MALE"
   },
   "address": {
      "city": "test1",
      "country": "PH",
      "district": "test",
      "postal_code": "1111",
      "street_line1": "test",
      "street_line2": "test",
      "sub_district": "test",
      "province_state": "test"
  },
  "kyc_documents": [
        {
            "type": "SEC_CERTIFICATE_REGISTRATION_DOCUMENT",
            "country": "PH",
            "file_id": "63f8719642f5856dcb142bd2",
        },
        {
            "type": "SELFIE_WITH_PRIMARY_ID_DOCUMENT",
            "country": "PH",
            "file_id": "63f8719642f5856dcb142bd2",
        },
        {
            "type": "ARTICLES_OF_INCORPORATION_DOCUMENT",
            "country": "PH",
            "file_id": "63f8719642f5856dcb142bd2"
        },
        {
            "type": "NOTARIZED_SECRETARY_CERTIFICATE_DOCUMENT",
            "country": "PH",
            "file_id": "63f8719642f5856dcb142bd2"
        },
        {
            "type": "LATEST_GIS_DOCUMENT",
            "country": "PH",
            "file_id": "63f8719642f5856dcb142bd2"
        },
        {
            "type": "SERVICE_AGREEMENT_DOCUMENT",
            "country": "PH",
            "file_id": "63f8719642f5856dcb142bd2"
        }
  ],
  "website_url": "https://xendit.co",
  "phone_number": "+63281234567",
  "email": "test@xendit.co",
}

Hubungkan Account Holder ke sub-akun

Setelah membuat Account Holder, Anda harus menghubungkan Account Holder ke sub-akun merchant Anda menggunakan API key akun Platform dengan izin writeuntuk Accounts.

Dengan menggunakan endpoint update account, Anda harus menghubungkan account_holder_id ke business_id sub-akun merchant Anda. Anda dapat melakukannya dengan menentukan account_holder_id pada request body.

PATCH https://api.xendit.co/v2/accounts/{sub-account-id}
{
    "account_holder_id": "3bd4dcdd-e6c0-4057-89bf-58d1564b517b"
}

Perlu dikeathui bahwa proses ini juga akan memulai proses verifikasi Account Holder ini. Ini akan mengubah status verifikasi Know Your Customer (KYC) dari not_started menjadi verification_in_progress.

Title: สร้างคำขอการยืนยัน
Content:
ในการสร้างคำขอการยืนยัน (verification requests) คุณจะต้องระบุประเภทนิติบุคคล (entity type) ของร้านค้าของคุณก่อน พารามิเตอร์ที่จำเป็นมีระบุไว้ด้านล่างสำหรับแต่ละประเทศและประเภทนิติบุคคล (เช่น Philippines Corporation)

คุณอาจต้องให้ร้านค้าของคุณลงนามใน Service Agreement กับ Xendit ด้วย โปรดปรึกษาผู้จัดการบัญชีของคุณ และเราจะจัดเตรียมเทมเพลตนี้ให้ตามความจำเป็น

อัปโหลดไฟล์สำหรับการยืนยัน

ถัดไป คุณจะต้องใช้ Upload File API เพื่ออัปโหลดเอกสารที่คุณรวบรวมจากร้านค้าของคุณไปยัง Xendit และบันทึก IDs เพื่อนำไปรวมในคำขอ Create Account Holder

POST https://api.xendit.co/files
{
  "purpose": "KYC_DOCUMENT",
  "file": "@/Users/MyName/Documents/identity-card.pdf"
}

สร้าง Account Holder object

ตรวจสอบให้แน่ใจว่า API key ของบัญชี Platform ของคุณได้รับสิทธิ์ (permissions) ดังต่อไปนี้:

  • xenPlatform Accounts write

  • xenPlatform Account Holder write

คุณจะต้องกรอกพารามิเตอร์ที่จำเป็นตามประเภทนิติบุคคล (entity type) ของคุณ โปรดดู รายการข้อกำหนดด้านล่าง เพื่อสร้างโครงสร้าง request body ของคุณ เมื่อสร้างสำเร็จ เราจะส่งคืน account_holder_id

รวม File IDs ที่ส่งคืนในขั้นตอนก่อนหน้าไว้ในพารามิเตอร์ kyc_documents

ตัวอย่าง - PH Corporation

ด้านล่างนี้คือตัวอย่าง request payload สำหรับประเภทนิติบุคคล corporation ในประเทศฟิลิปปินส์

  "email": "test@xendit.co",
}

เชื่อมโยง Account Holder เข้ากับ sub-account

เมื่อคุณสร้าง Account Holder แล้ว คุณจะต้องเชื่อมโยง Account Holder เข้ากับบัญชี Partner ของคุณ โดยใช้ API key ของบัญชี Platform ที่มีสิทธิ์ write สำหรับ Accounts

เมื่อใช้ endpoint update account คุณจะต้องเชื่อมโยง account_holder_id เข้ากับ business_id ที่ถูกต้อง ซึ่งแสดงถึง sub-account ของร้านค้าของคุณ คุณสามารถทำได้โดยระบุ account_holder_id ใน request body

PATCH https://api.xendit.co/v2/accounts/{sub-account-id}
{
    "account_holder_id": "3bd4dcdd-e6c0-4057-89bf-58d1564b517b"
}

โปรดทราบว่ากระบวนการเชื่อมโยงนี้จะเริ่มกระบวนการยืนยัน (verification process) ของ Account Holder นี้ด้วย ซึ่งจะเปลี่ยนสถานะการยืนยัน Know Your Customer (KYC) จาก not_started เป็น verification_in_progress

Title: Crear solicitudes de verificación
Content:
Para crear solicitudes de verificación, primero necesitará identificar el tipo de entidad de sus comercios. Los parámetros requeridos están disponibles a continuación para cada país y tipo de entidad (ej. Philippines Corporation).

También puede que necesite que sus comercios firmen un Service Agreement con Xendit. Por favor, consulte a su gerente de cuenta y le proporcionaremos esta plantilla según sea necesario.

Subir archivos para la verificación

A continuación, también necesitará usar el Upload File API para subir a Xendit los documentos que recopiló de sus comercios, y guardar los ID para incluirlos en el Create Account Holder request.

POST https://api.xendit.co/files
{
  "purpose": "KYC_DOCUMENT",
  "file": "@/Users/MyName/Documents/identity-card.pdf"
}

Crear un Account Holder object

Asegúrese de que la API key de su cuenta Platform tenga los permisos que se indican a continuación:

  • xenPlatform Accounts write

  • xenPlatform Account Holder write

Deberá completar los parámetros requeridos de acuerdo con su tipo de entidad. Consulte la lista de requisitos a continuación para construir la estructura de su request body. Tras la creación exitosa, le devolveremos el account_holder_id .

Incluya los ID de Archivo devueltos en el paso anterior en el parámetro kyc_documents.

Ejemplo - PH Corporation

A continuación se muestra un request payload de ejemplo para un tipo de entidad corporation de Filipinas

Vincular el Account Holder a una sub-cuenta

Una vez que haya creado su Account Holder, deberá vincular el Account Holder a la Cuenta de su Socio utilizando la API key de la cuenta Platform con un permiso write para Accounts.

Usando el update account endpoint, deberá vincular el account_holder_id a un business_id válido que represente la sub-cuenta de su comercio. Puede hacerlo especificando el account_holder_id en el request body.

PATCH https://api.xendit.co/v2/accounts/{sub-account-id}
{
    "account_holder_id": "3bd4dcdd-e6c0-4057-89bf-58d1564b517b"
}

Tenga en cuenta que este proceso de vinculación también iniciará el proceso de verificación de este Account Holder. Esto cambiará el estado de verificación Know Your Customer (KYC) de not_started a verification_in_progress.

Parámetros Requeridos para Filipinas

Parameter

Type

Descripción

business_detail

object

Un object que contiene los detalles del comercio de su socio

  • type: CORPORATION, INDIVIDUAL, SOLE_PROPRIETORSHIP, PARTNERSHIP, FOREIGN_SEC, FOREIGN_NONSEC

  • legal_name

  • trading_name

  • description

  • industry_category

  • date_of_registration

  • country_of_operation: ISO 3166-2 format

individual_details

array (object)

Un array de objects que contiene los detalles del personal del comercio de su socio

  • role: El rol del individuo en su comercio

  • type: PIC or INCORPORATOR (requires one PIC)

  • given_names

  • surname

  • phone_number

  • email

  • nationality: ISO 3166-2 format

  • place_of_birth

  • date_of_birth

  • gender: male, female, other

  • tax_identification_number

  • address: Un object similar al address object a continuación para el individuo. Esto solo es requerido cuando necesitan activar Cards con USD o capacidades recurrentes.

address

object

La dirección de su comercio que contiene:

  • city

  • country: ISO 3166-2 format

  • district

  • postal_code

  • street_line1

  • street_line2 (opcional)

  • sub_district

  • province_state

kyc_documents

array (object)

Un array de objects que contiene los documentos KYC requeridos subidos a través de File Upload.

  • type: Uno de los KYC Document Types requeridos a continuación, que coincida con el país y el tipo de entidad

  • country: El código de país que coincide con el país del comercio

  • file_id: El ID de archivo devuelto por el File Upload API

  • expires_at (opcional): La fecha de expiración del documento si es relevante. Formato YYYY-MM-DD

string

El sitio web asociado con el comercio

El número de teléfono asociado con el comercio

email

string

La dirección de correo electrónico asociada con el comercio
